user_question: How should a transliteration conflict be handled?
llm_output: This is medium risk. The transliteration conflict should be routed to manual review before any approval decision.

evidence.text: Two transliterations match similar but not identical watchlist aliases.
Date of birth does not match the closest alias.

policy_rules.text: Name transliteration conflicts require manual review.
Review should avoid definitive sanctions claims without evidence.
